title: Teleportation Talismans
description: Adds a item that can be used as a survival alternative to the tp command
body:
Teleportation Talismans is an innovative and immersive mod designed to enhance the survival experience in your favorite sandbox game. With this mod installed, players gain access to a remarkable new item known as the Teleportation Talisman.

 

These enchanted talismans hold extraordinary powers, allowing adventurers to traverse vast distances in an instant, providing an exciting alternative to the traditional teleportation commands.

The Teleportation Talismans mod brings an element of convenience and adventure to survival gameplay, enabling players to travel swiftly while preserving the sense of discovery and exploration. With this mod, survival enthusiasts can explore the vast expanses of their world more efficiently, connect distant bases, discover hidden locations, and embark on grand adventures with ease.
